prompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
userPrompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
expandedPrompt: A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a large oversized head and sleepy eyes. The character has a rounded silhouette resembling a mushroom cap, with a smooth texture for a glossy finish. The wizard holds a tiny glowing staff that emits a soft blue light, and wears a starry wizard hat adorned with tiny sparkles. The body is compact and connected, with subtle mushroom gills visible at the base. The expression is dreamy and relaxed, with a slight smile. The color palette features vibrant blue tones complemented by soft white highlights and glowing blue accents.

  "subject": "blue mushroom wizard",
  "mood": "dreamy",
  "palettePlan": { "primary": "vibrant blue", "secondary": "soft white", "accent": "glowing blue" },
  "styleTags": ["cute mascot", "glossy SVG", "blue-avatar quality"],
  "visualChecklist": [
    "oversized mushroom cap head",
    "sleepy half-closed eyes",
    "tiny glowing staff",
    "starry wizard hat",
    "smooth glossy texture",
    "rounded body shape",
    "mushroom gills at the base",
    "subtle sparkles around the staff"
  ],
  "requiredDetails": [
    "mushroom cap head shape",
    "glowing blue light from the staff",
    "sleepy expression with half-closed eyes",
    "starry wizard hat accessory"
  ],
  "requiredRenderableDetails": [
    { "id": "mushroom_cap", "label": "mushroom cap head", "acceptableShapes": ["capShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["head.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "sleepy_eyes", "label": "sleepy eyes", "acceptableShapes": ["eyeShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["eyes.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "glowing_staff", "label": "tiny glowing staff", "acceptableShapes": ["staffShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["hand.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "starry_hat", "label": "starry wizard hat", "acceptableShapes": ["hatShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["head.socket"], "minimumCount": 1 }
  ],
  "forbiddenDetails": ["raw SVG", "HTML", "unvalidated custom shapes", "external images"],
  "qualityConstraints": ["oversized expressive head", "compact connected body", "readable silhouette", "valid renderer sockets only"]
}
